CheckBox1.name: CheckBox1
CheckBox1.label: Check if you want to tag all requirements as complete

Label13.name: Label13
Label13.label: The inspection team leader should ensure that contact is made with the inspectionee to:

Label2.name: Label2
Label2.label: a) confirm communication channels with the inspectionee’s representatives;

Label3.name: Label3
Label3.label: b) confirm the authority to conduct the inspection;

Label4.name: Label4
Label4.label: c) provide relevant information on the inspection objectives, scope, criteria, methods and inspection team composition, including any technical experts;

Label5.name: Label5
Label5.label: d) request access to relevant information for planning purposes including information on the risks and opportunities the organization has identified and how they are addressed;

Label6.name: Label6
Label6.label: e) determine applicable statutory and regulatory requirements and other requirements relevant to the activities, processes, products and services of the inspectionee;

Label7.name: Label7
Label7.label: f) confirm the agreement with the inspectionee regarding the extent of the disclosure and the treatment of confidential information;

Label8.name: Label8
Label8.label: g) make arrangements for the inspection including the schedule;

Label9.name: Label9
Label9.label: h) determine any location-specific arrangements for access, health and safety, security, confidentiality or other;

Label10.name: Label10
Label10.label: i) agree on the attendance of observers and the need for guides or interpreters for the inspection team;

Label11.name: Label11
Label11.label: j) determine any areas of interest, concern or risks to the inspectionee in relation to the specific inspection;

Label12.name: Label12
Label12.label: k) resolve issues regarding composition of the inspection team with the inspectionee or inspection client.

Label14.name: Label14
Label14.label: By confirming the schedule, you acknowledge that all inspectees confirmed the inspection time.

CheckIsLocationOverride.name: CheckIsLocationOverride
CheckIsLocationOverride.label: Set this location to the inspection to be executed

Label15.name: Label15
Label15.label: The meeting request was not created. You can send the request again by clicking the button on the right.

children.caption: Check if you want to tag all requirements as complete
Set this location to the inspection to be executed
The meeting request was not created. You can send the request again by clicking the button on the right.
The inspection team leader should ensure that contact is made with the inspectionee to:
a) confirm communication channels with the inspectionee’s representatives;
b) confirm the authority to conduct the inspection;
c) provide relevant information on the inspection objectives, scope, criteria, methods and inspection team composition, including any technical experts;
d) request access to relevant information for planning purposes including information on the risks and opportunities the organization has identified and how they are addressed;
e) determine applicable statutory and regulatory requirements and other requirements relevant to the activities, processes, products and services of the inspectionee;
f) confirm the agreement with the inspectionee regarding the extent of the disclosure and the treatment of confidential information;
g) make arrangements for the inspection including the schedule;
h) determine any location-specific arrangements for access, health and safety, security, confidentiality or other;
i) agree on the attendance of observers and the need for guides or interpreters for the inspection team;
j) determine any areas of interest, concern or risks to the inspectionee in relation to the specific inspection;
k) resolve issues regarding composition of the inspection team with the inspectionee or inspection client.
By confirming the schedule, you acknowledge that all inspectees confirmed the inspection time.
